# Project 6: 1100+600 = 1700

# Nov: Income 3500, Cost 1400, OpEx 100 => expense=1500

data_font = Font(name=\"Arial\", size=11)
thin_border = Border(

    top=Side(style=\"thin\"),

)

# Title
ws.merge_cells(\"A1:G1\")
ws[\"A1\"] = \"Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table\"
ws[\"A1\"].font = Font(name=\"Arial\", bold=True, size=14)
ws[\"A1\"].alignment = Alignment(horizontal=\"center\")

# Column headers
headers = [\"Rank\", \"Financial Dashboard\", \"Amount\", \"Profit Statement\", \"Amount\", \"Income/Expense Charts\", \"Amount\"]
for col, h in enumerate(headers, 1):

# Data rows

for i, (label, vals) in enumerate(zip(chart_data_labels, chart_data_vals)):

# Add a secondary table with item labels for reference
ws2[\"A9\"] = \"Rank\"
ws2[\"B9\"] = \"Dashboard Item\"
ws2[\"C9\"] = \"Dashboard Amount\"
ws2[\"D9\"] = \"Profit Stmt Item\"
ws2[\"E9\"] = \"Profit Stmt Amount\"
ws2[\"F9\"] = \"Charts Item\"
ws2[\"G9\"] = \"Charts Amount\"
for cell_ref in [\"A9\",\"B9\",\"C9\",\"D9\",\"E9\",\"F9\",\"G9\"]:
    ws2[cell_ref].font = sub_header_font

    ws2[cell_ref].alignment = Alignment(horizontal=\"center\")

for i in range(5):

    ws2.cell(row=r, column=1, value=i+1)
    ws2.cell(row=r, column=2, value=file1_top5[i][0])

# Create bar chart

chart.type = \"col\"

ws.merge_cells(\"A1:G1\")
ws[\"A1\"] = \"Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table\"
ws[\"A1\"].font = Font(bold=True, size=14)
ws[\"A1\"].alignment = Alignment(horizontal=\"center\", vertical=\"center\")

for c, h in enumerate(sub_headers, 1):

ws2 = wb2[\"Income Expense Details\"]

expense_2 = defaultdict(float)
for r in range(7, 31):  # Data rows
    category = ws2.cell(row=r, column=3).value  # Category: Income/Expense
    item = ws2.cell(row=r, column=4).value       # Income/Expense Item
    amount = ws2.cell(row=r, column=5).value      # Amount
    if category and str(category).strip() == \"Expense\" and item and amount and isinstance(amount, (int, float)):
        expense_2[str(item).strip()] += amount

top5_2 = sorted(expense_2.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# Expense items here are: Cost Amount and Operating Expense per month
# We need to aggregate these as \"expense items\" - treat Cost Amount and Operating Expense as two categories
# But actually, looking at the data, each month has Cost Amount and Operating Expense as expense line items
# Let's collect all expense items: Cost Amount per month + Operating Expense per month
# But for \"top 5 expense items\", the items are the months (since each month is an expense entry)
# Actually, the expense structure is different: the two expense categories are \"Cost Amount\" and \"Operating Expense\"
# Let's aggregate by those two categories, but that gives only 2 items.
# Better interpretation: each row is an \"expense item\" = the total expense for that month
# Total expense per month = Cost Amount + Operating Expense

expense_3 = {}  # month -> total expense (Cost + Operating Expense)
for r in range(5, 17):  # Jan-Dec
    month = ws3.cell(row=r, column=2).value
    cost = ws3.cell(row=r, column=4).value
    operating = ws3.cell(row=r, column=5).value
    if month and cost and operating:
        cost_val = cost if isinstance(cost, (int, float)) else 0
        op_val = operating if isinstance(operating, (int, float)) else 0
        expense_3[str(month)] = cost_val + op_val

top5_3 = sorted(expense_3.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]
print(\"File 3 (Visual Charts) Top 5:\", top5_3)

# Title
ws_table.merge_cells('A1:G1')

ws_table.cell(row=1, column=1).alignment = center_align

# Subtitle row
ws_table.merge_cells('A2:G2')
ws_table.cell(row=2, column=1, value=\"Compiled from Financial Report Dashboard, Income/Expense Visualization Charts, and Profit Statement\").font = Font(name='Arial', size=10, italic=True, color='666666')

    else:
        for col in [2, 3]:

    # File 2
    if i < len(top5_2):
        c = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=4, value=top5_2[i][0])
        c.font = data_font; c.alignment = center_align; c.border = border
        c = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=5, value=top5_2[i][1])
        c.font = data_font; c.alignment = center_align; c.border = border; c.number_format = '#,##0'
    else:
        for col in [4, 5]:

    # File 3
    if i < len(top5_3):

        c = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=7, value=top5_3[i][1])
        c.font = data_font; c.alignment = center_align; c.border = border; c.number_format = '#,##0'
    else:

            c.font = data_font; c.alignment = center_align; c.border = border

    # row index: B=Date, C=Expense Item, D=Summary, E=Amount, F=Account
    item = row[1]  # C column (0-indexed from B... but values_only gives all columns)
    amount = row[3]  # E column
    if item and amount and isinstance(amount, (int, float)):
        file1_expenses[str(item)] += float(amount)

# Sort and take top 5

import xlsxwriter

output_path = \"/home/user/run/pm_codex_15_nokg_rrb1d/model_output/financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx\"
workbook = xlsxwriter.Workbook(output_path)

# Formatting
title_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'bold': True, 'font_size': 14, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter',
    'border': 1, 'bg_color': '#1F4E79', 'font_color': '#FFFFFF'
})
header_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'bold': True, 'font_size': 11, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter',
    'border': 1, 'bg_color': '#5B9BD5', 'font_color': '#FFFFFF'
})
cell_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'font_size': 10, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter', 'border': 1
})
num_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'font_size': 10, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter', 'border': 1,
    'num_format': '#,##0'
})

# Title
ws_table.merge_range('A1:G1', 'Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table', title_fmt)
ws_table.set_row(0, 30)

# Headers
headers = ['Rank', 
           'Dashboard - Expense Item', 'Dashboard - Amount',
           'Profit Statement - Expense Item', 'Profit Statement - Amount',
           'Visual Charts - Expense Item', 'Visual Charts - Amount']
for col, h in enumerate(headers):
    ws_table.write(1, col, h, header_fmt)

# Fill data

for i in range(max_rows):
    row_idx = i + 2
    ws_table.write(row_idx, 0, i + 1, cell_fmt)
    
    if i < len(file1_top5):
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 1, file1_top5[i][0], cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 2, file1_top5[i][1], num_fmt)
    else:
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 1, '-', cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 2, '-', cell_fmt)
    
    if i < len(file2_top5):
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 3, file2_top5[i][0], cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 4, file2_top5[i][1], num_fmt)
    else:
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 3, '-', cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 4, '-', cell_fmt)
    
    if i < len(file3_top5):
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 5, file3_top5[i][0], cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 6, file3_top5[i][1], num_fmt)
    else:
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 5, '-', cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 6, '-', cell_fmt)

# Column widths
ws_table.set_column('A:A', 6)
ws_table.set_column('B:B', 22)
ws_table.set_column('C:C', 16)
ws_table.set_column('D:D', 28)
ws_table.set_column('E:E', 22)
ws_table.set_column('F:F', 32)
ws_table.set_column('G:G', 22)

# ---- Sheet 2: Bar Chart ----
ws_chart = workbook.add_worksheet(\"Expense Bar Chart\")

# Prepare chart data - combine all top5 items into one dataset
# We'll create a bar chart comparing all top expense items across sources
all_items = []

# Collect unique expense item names for chart
chart_data_start = 0
row = 0

# Title
ws_chart.write(0, 0, 'High-Expense Items Comparison', title_fmt)
ws_chart.merge_range(0, 0, 0, 3, 'High-Expense Items Comparison', workbook.add_format({
    'bold': True, 'font_size': 14, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter',
    'font_color': '#1F4E79'
}))
ws_chart.set_row(0, 30)

# Write chart data table
ws_chart.write(2, 0, 'Source File', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(2, 1, 'Expense Item', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(2, 2, 'Amount', header_fmt)

data_row = 3
for item, amt in file1_top5:
    ws_chart.write(data_row, 0, 'Dashboard', cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write(data_row, 1, item, cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(data_row, 2, amt, num_fmt)
    data_row += 1

for item, amt in file2_top5:
    ws_chart.write(data_row, 0, 'Profit Statement', cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write(data_row, 1, item, cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(data_row, 2, amt, num_fmt)
    data_row += 1

for item, amt in file3_top5:
    ws_chart.write(data_row, 0, 'Visual Charts', cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write(data_row, 1, item, cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(data_row, 2, amt, num_fmt)
    data_row += 1

end_data_row = data_row - 1

# Create bar chart
chart = workbook.add_chart({'type': 'column'})
chart.set_title({'name': 'Top Expense Items Comparison Across Sources'})
chart.set_y_axis({'name': 'Amount'})
chart.set_x_axis({'name': 'Expense Item'})
chart.set_size({'width': 900, 'height': 500})

# For a proper grouped bar chart, we need categories and series per source
# Let's restructure: categories = all unique top5 items, series = each source

# Collect all items from all sources
all_items_set = set()
for item, _ in file1_top5:
    all_items_set.add(item)
for item, _ in file2_top5:
    all_items_set.add(item)
for item, _ in file3_top5:
    all_items_set.add(item)
all_items_list = sorted(all_items_set)

# Write restructured data for the chart
ws_chart.write(2 + (end_data_row - 3 + 1) + 2, 0, 'Chart Data', workbook.add_format({'bold': True, 'font_size': 12}))
chart_data_start_row = 2 + (end_data_row - 3 + 1) + 3

ws_chart.write(chart_data_start_row, 0, 'Expense Item', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(chart_data_start_row, 1, 'Dashboard', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(chart_data_start_row, 2, 'Profit Statement', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(chart_data_start_row, 3, 'Visual Charts', header_fmt)

file1_dict = dict(file1_top5)
file2_dict = dict(file2_top5)
file3_dict = dict(file3_top5)

for idx, item in enumerate(all_items_list):
    r = chart_data_start_row + 1 + idx
    ws_chart.write(r, 0, item, cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(r, 1, file1_dict.get(item, 0), num_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(r, 2, file2_dict.get(item, 0), num_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(r, 3, file3_dict.get(item, 0), num_fmt)

num_items = len(all_items_list)

# Add series to chart
categories = f\"'Expense Bar Chart'"'!$A${chart_data_start_row+1}:$A${chart_data_start_row+num_items}"

for col_idx, (series_name, col_letter) in enumerate([
    ('"'Dashboard', 'B'), ('Profit Statement', 'C'), ('Visual Charts', 'D')]):
    values = f\"'Expense Bar Chart'"'!${col_letter}${chart_data_start_row+1}:${col_letter}${chart_data_start_row+num_items}"
    chart.add_series({
        '"'name': series_name,
        'categories': categories,
        'values': values,
        'fill': {'color': ['#4472C4', '#ED7D31', '#70AD47'][col_idx]},
    })

ws_chart.insert_chart(chart_data_start_row + num_items + 2, 0, chart)

# Set column widths
ws_chart.set_column('A:A', 25)
ws_chart.set_column('B:B', 25)
ws_chart.set_column('C:C', 25)
ws_chart.set_column('D:D', 25)

workbook.close()
print(f\"\\nExcel file saved: {output_path}\")

import openpyxl
from collections import defaultdict
import xlsxwriter

# ============================================================
# FILE 1: Dashboard - Expense Details sheet
# ============================================================
wb1 = openpyxl.load_workbook(\"/home/user/ws/mnt/desktop/2-financial-analysis-tables/4-financial-table-income-expense-dashboard.xlsx\", data_only=True)
ws1 = wb1['Expense Details']

file1_expenses = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws1.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=ws1.max_row, min_col=2, max_col=9, values_only=True):
    # row: B=Date(idx0), C=Expense Item(idx1), D=Summary(idx2), E=Amount(idx3), F=Account(idx4)
    item = row[1]  # C = Expense Item
    amount = row[3]  # E = Amount
    if item and amount and isinstance(amount, (int, float)):
        file1_expenses[str(item)] += float(amount)

file1_top5 = sorted(file1_expenses.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]
print(\"FILE 1 (Dashboard) Top 5 Expenses:\")
for k, v in file1_top5:
    print(f\"  {k}: {v}\")

# ============================================================
# FILE 2: Profit Statement - Income Expense Details sheet
# ============================================================
wb2 = openpyxl.load_workbook(\"/home/user/ws/mnt/desktop/2-financial-analysis-tables/5-financial-table-income-expense-profit-statement_visual-charts_.xlsx\", data_only=True)
ws2 = wb2['Income Expense Details']

file2_expenses = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws2.iter_rows(min_row=7, max_row=ws2.max_row, min_col=2, max_col=8, values_only=True):
    # B=Date(idx0), C=Category(idx1), D=Item(idx2), E=Amount(idx3), F=Account(idx4)
    category = row[1]
    item = row[2]
    amount = row[3]
    if category == 'Expense' and item and amount and isinstance(amount, (int, float)):
        file2_expenses[str(item)] += float(amount)

file2_top5 = sorted(file2_expenses.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]
print(\"\\nFILE 2 (Profit Statement) Top 5 Expenses:\")
for k, v in file2_top5:
    print(f\"  {k}: {v}\")

# ============================================================
# FILE 3: Income/Expense Visual Charts
# ============================================================
wb3 = openpyxl.load_workbook(\"/home/user/ws/mnt/desktop/2-financial-analysis-tables/6-financial-table-income-and-expense-data-visual-charts.xlsx\", data_only=True)
ws3 = wb3['Sheet1']

months_data = []
for row in ws3.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=16, min_col=2, max_col=7, values_only=True):
    # B=Month(idx0), C=Income(idx1), D=Cost(idx2), E=OpExpense(idx3)
    month = row[0]
    income = row[1]
    cost = row[2]
    op_exp = row[3]
    if month:
        months_data.append({
            'Month': str(month),
            'Income Amount': float(income) if income else 0,
            'Cost Amount': float(cost) if cost else 0,
            'Operating Expense': float(op_exp) if op_exp else 0,
        })

# For file 3, treat each month's Cost Amount and Operating Expense as expense items
file3_items = {}
for m in months_data:
    file3_items[f\"{m['Month']} - Cost Amount\"] = m['Cost Amount']
    file3_items[f\"{m['Month']} - Operating Expense\"] = m['Operating Expense']

file3_top5 = sorted(file3_items.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]
print(\"\\nFILE 3 (Visual Charts) Top 5 Expense Items:\")
for k, v in file3_top5:
    print(f\"  {k}: {v}\")

# ============================================================
# Create output Excel
# ============================================================
output_path = \"/home/user/run/pm_codex_15_nokg_rrb1d/model_output/financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx\"
workbook = xlsxwriter.Workbook(output_path)

# ---- Sheet 1: Comparison Table ----
ws_table = workbook.add_worksheet(\"Top 5 Expense Comparison\")

title_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'bold': True, 'font_size': 14, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter',
    'border': 1, 'bg_color': '#1F4E79', 'font_color': '#FFFFFF'
})
header_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'bold': True, 'font_size': 11, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter',
    'border': 1, 'bg_color': '#5B9BD5', 'font_color': '#FFFFFF',
    'text_wrap': True
})
cell_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'font_size': 10, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter', 'border': 1
})
num_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'font_size': 10, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter', 'border': 1,
    'num_format': '#,##0'
})
highlight_fmt = workbook.add_format({
    'font_size': 10, 'align': 'center', 'valign': 'vcenter', 'border': 1,
    'bg_color': '#FFF2CC', 'bold': True, 'num_format': '#,##0'
})

# Title row
ws_table.merge_range('A1:G1', 'Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table', title_fmt)
ws_table.set_row(0, 35)

# Headers
headers = ['Rank',
           'Dashboard - Expense Item', 'Dashboard - Amount',
           'Profit Statement - Expense Item', 'Profit Statement - Amount',
           'Visual Charts - Expense Item', 'Visual Charts - Amount']
for col, h in enumerate(headers):
    ws_table.write(1, col, h, header_fmt)

ws_table.set_row(1, 35)

# Fill data
for i in range(5):
    row_idx = i + 2
    ws_table.write(row_idx, 0, i + 1, cell_fmt)
    
    if i < len(file1_top5):
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 1, file1_top5[i][0], cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write_number(row_idx, 2, file1_top5[i][1], num_fmt)
    
    if i < len(file2_top5):
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 3, file2_top5[i][0], cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write_number(row_idx, 4, file2_top5[i][1], num_fmt)
    
    if i < len(file3_top5):
        ws_table.write(row_idx, 5, file3_top5[i][0], cell_fmt)
        ws_table.write_number(row_idx, 6, file3_top5[i][1], num_fmt)

# Column widths
ws_table.set_column('A:A', 6)
ws_table.set_column('B:B', 24)
ws_table.set_column('C:C', 18)
ws_table.set_column('D:D', 30)
ws_table.set_column('E:E', 24)
ws_table.set_column('F:F', 34)
ws_table.set_column('G:G', 22)

# ---- Sheet 2: Bar Chart ----
ws_chart = workbook.add_worksheet(\"Expense Bar Chart\")

# We need a grouped bar chart. Let's structure data with all unique items across sources
# For proper grouping, we need consistent categories
# Let's collect all top 5 items from each source and create chart data

all_items_file1 = file1_top5  # list of (name, amount)
all_items_file2 = file2_top5
all_items_file3 = file3_top5

# Collect all unique expense item names
all_names = []
for name, _ in all_items_file1:
    if name not in all_names:
        all_names.append(name)
for name, _ in all_items_file2:
    if name not in all_names:
        all_names.append(name)
for name, _ in all_items_file3:
    if name not in all_names:
        all_names.append(name)

# Build lookup dicts
file1_dict = dict(file1_top5)
file2_dict = dict(file2_top5)
file3_dict = dict(file3_top5)

# Write chart data table on the chart sheet
chart_start_row = 1

ws_chart.write(chart_start_row, 0, 'Expense Item', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(chart_start_row, 1, 'Dashboard', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(chart_start_row, 2, 'Profit Statement', header_fmt)
ws_chart.write(chart_start_row, 3, 'Visual Charts', header_fmt)

for idx, name in enumerate(all_names):
    r = chart_start_row + 1 + idx
    ws_chart.write(r, 0, name, cell_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(r, 1, file1_dict.get(name, 0), num_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(r, 2, file2_dict.get(name, 0), num_fmt)
    ws_chart.write_number(r, 3, file3_dict.get(name, 0), num_fmt)

num_items = len(all_names)

# Create bar chart
chart = workbook.add_chart({'type': 'column', 'subtype': 'clustered'})
chart.set_title({'name': 'Top Expense Items Comparison Across Sources'})
chart.set_y_axis({'name': 'Amount'})
chart.set_x_axis({'name': 'Expense Item'})
chart.set_size({'width': 1000, 'height': 550})
chart.set_legend({'position': 'top'})

categories_range = f\"'Expense Bar Chart'"'!$A${chart_start_row+1}:$A${chart_start_row+num_items}"

colors = ['"'#4472C4', '#ED7D31', '#70AD47']
series_names = ['Dashboard', 'Profit Statement', 'Visual Charts']

for col_idx, (sname, col_letter) in enumerate(zip(series_names, ['B', 'C', 'D'])):
    values_range = f\"'Expense Bar Chart'"'!${col_letter}${chart_start_row+1}:${col_letter}${chart_start_row+num_items}"
    chart.add_series({
        '"'name': sname,
        'categories': categories_range,
        'values': values_range,
        'fill': {'color': colors[col_idx]},
    })

ws_chart.insert_chart(chart_start_row + num_items + 3, 0, chart)

ws_chart.set_column('A:A', 30)
ws_chart.set_column('B:D', 20)

workbook.close()
print(f\"\\nExcel file saved: {output_path}\")
PYEOF"

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from collections import defaultdict
import os

WS = '/home/user/ws/plain'

# =====================================================================
# 1) Read expense data from each of the 3 source files
# =====================================================================

# --- File 1: Income Expense Dashboard (Expense Details sheet) ---
f1 = f'{WS}/desktop/2-financial-analysis-tables/4-financial-table-income-expense-dashboard.xlsx'
wb1 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f1, data_only=True)
ws1 = wb1['Expense Details']
expenses_f1 = defaultdict(float)  # item -> amount
for row in ws1.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=ws1.max_row, values_only=False):
    item = row[2].value  # C column: Expense Item
    amt = row[4].value   # E column: Amount
    if item and amt:
        try:
            expenses_f1[str(item).strip()] += float(amt)
        except:
            pass
wb1.close()
print(\"File1 (Dashboard - Expense Details):\", dict(expenses_f1))

ws2 = wb2['Income Expense Details']

    item = row[3].value  # D column: Income/Expense Item
    amt = row[4].value  # E column: Amount
    if cat and str(cat).strip().lower() == 'expense' and item and amt:
        try:
            expenses_f2[str(item).strip()] += float(amt)
        except:
            pass
wb2.close()
print(\"File2 (Profit Statement - Expenses):\", dict(expenses_f2))

# --- File 3: Visual Charts (Sheet1) - expense items are Cost Amount + Operating Expense per month ---

# But these are categories across months, not individual items.

# For top-5 expense \"items\", we aggregate by month (each month is an \"expense item\" period)
# OR treat the expense categories themselves. Let's re-read carefully.

# The expense categories are \"Cost Amount\" and \"Operating Expense\"
# For top-5, we can look at each month as a grouping OR the categories.
# Since the other files group by \"Project X\", let's group monthly total expenses.

expenses_f3 = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws3.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=16, values_only=False):
    month = row[1].value  # B column: Month
    cost = row[3].value   # D column: Cost Amount
    opex = row[4].value   # E column: Operating Expense
    if month:
        total_exp = (float(cost) if cost else 0) + (float(opex) if opex else 0)
        expenses_f3[str(month).strip()] = total_exp
wb3.close()

    sorted_items = sorted(d.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    return sorted_items[:5]

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from collections import defaultdict, OrderedDict
from copy import copy

# =====================================================
# Step 1: Extract data from each source file
# =====================================================

BASE = '/home/user/ws/plain/desktop/2-financial-analysis-tables'

# --- File 4: Income Expense Dashboard ---
wb4 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f'{BASE}/4-financial-table-income-expense-dashboard.xlsx')
ws4_exp = wb4['Expense Details']
expenses_4 = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws4_exp.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=ws4_exp.max_row, values_only=False):
    item = row[2].value  # Column C = Expense Item
    amount = row[4].value  # Column E = Amount
    if item and amount:
        expenses_4[item] += float(amount)
top5_4 = sorted(expenses_4.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# --- File 5: Profit Statement ---
wb5 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f'{BASE}/5-financial-table-income-expense-profit-statement_visual-charts_.xlsx')
ws5 = wb5['Income Expense Details']
expenses_5 = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws5.iter_rows(min_row=7, max_row=ws5.max_row, values_only=False):
    cat = row[2].value    # Column C = Category
    item = row[3].value   # Column D = Income/Expense Item
    amount = row[4].value  # Column E = Amount
    if cat == 'Expense' and item and amount:
        expenses_5[item] += float(amount)
top5_5 = sorted(expenses_5.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# --- File 6: Income and Expense Visual Charts ---
wb6 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f'{BASE}/6-financial-table-income-and-expense-data-visual-charts.xlsx')
ws6 = wb6['Sheet1']
monthly_data = []
for row in ws6.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=16, values_only=False):
    month = row[1].value   # Column B
    cost = row[3].value    # Column D = Cost Amount
    op_exp = row[4].value  # Column E = Operating Expense
    if month:
        monthly_data.append({
            'month': month,
            'cost': float(cost) if cost else 0,
            'op_expense': float(op_exp) if op_exp else 0
        })

# For file 6, create combined expense entries: each month's total expense
expenses_6 = {}
for d in monthly_data:
    total_exp = d['cost'] + d['op_expense']
    expenses_6[f\"{d['month']} Total Expense\"] = total_exp
# Also keep separate categories for more granularity
expenses_6_detailed = {}
for d in monthly_data:
    expenses_6_detailed[f\"{d['month']} - Cost Amount\"] = d['cost']
    expenses_6_detailed[f\"{d['month']} - Operating Expense\"] = d['op_expense']

top5_6_detailed = sorted(expenses_6_detailed.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]
# Also top 5 by total monthly expense
top5_6_total = sorted(expenses_6.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# =====================================================
# Step 2: Create the output Excel workbook
# =====================================================

wb = openpyxl.Workbook()

# --- Styling ---
header_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=12, color='FFFFFF')
header_fill = PatternFill(start_color='4472C4', end_color='4472C4', fill_type='solid')
title_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=16, color='1F4E79')
subtitle_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=13, color='2E75B6')
data_font = Font(name='Arial', size=11)
number_font = Font(name='Arial', size=11)
thin_border = Border(
    left=Side(style='thin'),
    right=Side(style='thin'),
    top=Side(style='thin'),
    bottom=Side(style='thin')
)
center_align = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
left_align = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center')
right_align = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')

# Rank highlight fills
rank_fills = {
    1: PatternFill(start_color='FFD700', end_color='FFD700', fill_type='solid'),  # Gold
    2: PatternFill(start_color='C0C0C0', end_color='C0C0C0', fill_type='solid'),  # Silver
    3: PatternFill(start_color='CD7F32', end_color='CD7F32', fill_type='solid'),  # Bronze
}

light_blue_fill = PatternFill(start_color='D6E4F0', end_color='D6E4F0', fill_type='solid')
light_gray_fill = PatternFill(start_color='F2F2F2', end_color='F2F2F2', fill_type='solid')

def style_header_cell(cell):
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.border = thin_border
    cell.alignment = center_align

def style_data_cell(cell, is_number=False):
    cell.font = data_font
    cell.border = thin_border
    if is_number:
        cell.alignment = right_align
        cell.number_format = '#,##0'
    else:
        cell.alignment = center_align

# =====================================================

ws_table.row_dimensions[1].height = 35

ws_table.merge_cells('A2:G2')

ws_table.column_dimensions['E'].width = 35
ws_table.column_dimensions['F'].width = 18
ws_table.column_dimensions['G'].width = 35

# Header row
row = 4
headers = ['Rank', 'Dashboard (File 4)', 'Amount', 'Profit Statement (File 5)', 'Amount', 'Visual Charts (File 6)', 'Amount']
for col_idx, h in enumerate(headers, 1):
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=col_idx, value=h)
    style_header_cell(cell)

# Data rows
max_rows = 5
for i in range(max_rows):
    row = 5 + i
    rank = i + 1
    
    # Determine fill for row
    row_fill = rank_fills.get(rank, light_gray_fill if i % 2 == 0 else None)
    
    # Rank
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1, value=rank)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    if row_fill:
        cell.fill = row_fill
    
    # File 4 data
    item_4, amt_4 = top5_4[i] if i < len(top5_4) else ('-', 0)
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=2, value='Expense Item')
    style_data_cell(cell)
    if row_fill:
        cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=3, value=item_4)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    cell.alignment = left_align
    if row_fill:
        cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=4, value=amt_4)

    # File 5 data
    item_5, amt_5 = top5_5[i] if i < len(top5_5) else ('-', 0)
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=5, value='Expense Item')

    if row_fill:
        cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=6, value=item_5)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    cell.alignment = left_align
    if row_fill:
        cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=7, value=amt_5)
    style_data_cell(cell, is_number=True)
    if row_fill:
        cell.fill = row_fill

# Note: We need a second table section for File 6 since it has different structure
row = 5 + max_rows + 1  # row 11

# Separator
ws_table.merge_cells(f'A{row}:G{row}')
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1, value='Top 5 Expense Items from Visual Charts (File 6) - Monthly Expense Breakdown')
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1).font = subtitle_font
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1).alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

row += 1
# Headers for file 6
headers6 = ['Rank', 'Month', 'Expense Item', 'Cost Amount', 'Operating Expense', 'Total Expense', '']
for col_idx, h in enumerate(headers6, 1):
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=col_idx, value=h)
    style_header_cell(cell)

for i in range(max_rows):

    item_6, amt_6 = top5_6_detailed[i] if i < len(top5_6_detailed) else ('-', 0)

    # Parse the item name

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from collections import defaultdict

# =====================================================
# Step 1: Extract data from each source file
# =====================================================

BASE = '/home/user/ws/plain/desktop/2-financial-analysis-tables'

# --- File 4: Income Expense Dashboard ---
wb4 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f'{BASE}/4-financial-table-income-expense-dashboard.xlsx')
ws4_exp = wb4['Expense Details']
expenses_4 = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws4_exp.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=ws4_exp.max_row, values_only=False):
    item = row[2].value
    amount = row[4].value
    if item and amount:
        expenses_4[item] += float(amount)
top5_4 = sorted(expenses_4.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# --- File 5: Profit Statement ---
wb5 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f'{BASE}/5-financial-table-income-expense-profit-statement_visual-charts_.xlsx')
ws5 = wb5['Income Expense Details']
expenses_5 = defaultdict(float)
for row in ws5.iter_rows(min_row=7, max_row=ws5.max_row, values_only=False):
    cat = row[2].value
    item = row[3].value
    amount = row[4].value
    if cat == 'Expense' and item and amount:
        expenses_5[item] += float(amount)
top5_5 = sorted(expenses_5.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# --- File 6: Income and Expense Visual Charts ---
wb6 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f'{BASE}/6-financial-table-income-and-expense-data-visual-charts.xlsx')
ws6 = wb6['Sheet1']
monthly_data = []
for row in ws6.iter_rows(min_row=5, max_row=16, values_only=False):
    month = row[1].value
    cost = row[3].value
    op_exp = row[4].value
    if month:
        monthly_data.append({
            'month': month,
            'cost': float(cost) if cost else 0,
            'op_expense': float(op_exp) if op_exp else 0
        })

expenses_6 = {}
for d in monthly_data:
    total_exp = d['cost'] + d['op_expense']
    expenses_6[f\"{d['month']} Total Expense\"] = total_exp
top5_6_total = sorted(expenses_6.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# Detailed top 5
expenses_6_detailed = {}
for d in monthly_data:
    expenses_6_detailed[f\"{d['month']} - Cost Amount\"] = d['cost']
    expenses_6_detailed[f\"{d['month']} - Operating Expense\"] = d['op_expense']
top5_6_detailed = sorted(expenses_6_detailed.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:5]

# =====================================================
# Step 2: Create the output Excel workbook
# =====================================================

wb = openpyxl.Workbook()

# --- Styling ---
header_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=11, color='FFFFFF')
header_fill = PatternFill(start_color='4472C4', end_color='4472C4', fill_type='solid')
title_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=16, color='1F4E79')
subtitle_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=13, color='2E75B6')
section_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=12, color='2E75B6')
data_font = Font(name='Arial', size=11)
thin_border = Border(
    left=Side(style='thin'),
    right=Side(style='thin'),
    top=Side(style='thin'),
    bottom=Side(style='thin')
)
center_align = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
left_align = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
right_align = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')

rank_fills = {
    1: PatternFill(start_color='FFD700', end_color='FFD700', fill_type='solid'),
    2: PatternFill(start_color='C0C0C0', end_color='C0C0C0', fill_type='solid'),
    3: PatternFill(start_color='CD7F32', end_color='CD7F32', fill_type='solid'),
}
light_gray_fill = PatternFill(start_color='F2F2F2', end_color='F2F2F2', fill_type='solid')

def style_header_cell(cell):
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.border = thin_border
    cell.alignment = center_align

def style_data_cell(cell, is_number=False):
    cell.font = data_font
    cell.border = thin_border
    if is_number:
        cell.alignment = right_align
        cell.number_format = '#,##0'
    else:
        cell.alignment = center_align

# =====================================================
# Sheet 1: Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table
# =====================================================
ws_table = wb.active
ws_table.title = 'Top 5 Expense Comparison'

# Title
ws_table.merge_cells('A1:G1')
ws_table['A1'] = 'Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table'
ws_table['A1'].font = title_font
ws_table['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws_table.row_dimensions[1].height = 40

# Description
ws_table.merge_cells('A2:G2')
ws_table['A2'] = 'Compiled from: Financial Report Dashboard, Income & Expense Visualization Charts, and Profit Statement'
ws_table['A2'].font = Font(name='Arial', italic=True, size=10, color='666666')
ws_table['A2'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

# Column widths
ws_table.column_dimensions['A'].width = 7
ws_table.column_dimensions['B'].width = 22
ws_table.column_dimensions['C'].width = 18
ws_table.column_dimensions['D'].width = 22
ws_table.column_dimensions['E'].width = 18
ws_table.column_dimensions['F'].width = 22
ws_table.column_dimensions['G'].width = 18

# === Section 1: File 4 & File 5 Comparison (Project-based) ===
row = 4

# Section header
ws_table.merge_cells(f'A{row}:G{row}')
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1, value='Section A: Project-Based Expense Comparison (Dashboard vs Profit Statement)')
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1).font = section_font
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1).alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws_table.row_dimensions[row].height = 28

row += 1
headers = ['Rank', 'Dashboard Item (File 4)', 'Amount', 'Profit Statement Item (File 5)', 'Amount', 'Visual Charts Item (File 6)', 'Amount']
for col_idx, h in enumerate(headers, 1):
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=col_idx, value=h)
    style_header_cell(cell)

# Data rows for Section A
for i in range(5):
    r = row + 1 + i
    rank = i + 1
    row_fill = rank_fills.get(rank, light_gray_fill if i % 2 == 0 else None)
    
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=1, value=rank)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    
    # File 4
    if i < len(top5_4):
        item_4, amt_4 = top5_4[i]
    else:
        item_4, amt_4 = '-', 0
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=2, value=item_4)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    cell.alignment = left_align
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=3, value=amt_4)
    style_data_cell(cell, is_number=True)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    
    # File 5
    if i < len(top5_5):
        item_5, amt_5 = top5_5[i]
    else:
        item_5, amt_5 = '-', 0
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=4, value=item_5)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    cell.alignment = left_align
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=5, value=amt_5)
    style_data_cell(cell, is_number=True)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    
    # File 6 (use top 5 monthly total expenses)
    if i < len(top5_6_total):
        item_6, amt_6 = top5_6_total[i]
    else:
        item_6, amt_6 = '-', 0
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=6, value=item_6)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    cell.alignment = left_align
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=7, value=amt_6)
    style_data_cell(cell, is_number=True)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill

# === Section 2: File 6 Detailed Monthly Breakdown ===
row = row + 7
ws_table.merge_cells(f'A{row}:G{row}')
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1, value='Section B: Top 5 Monthly Expense Details from Visual Charts (File 6)')
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1).font = section_font
ws_table.cell(row=row, column=1).alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws_table.row_dimensions[row].height = 28

row += 1
headers6 = ['Rank', 'Month', 'Expense Item', 'Amount', '', '', '']
for col_idx, h in enumerate(headers6, 1):
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=row, column=col_idx, value=h)
    style_header_cell(cell)

for i in range(5):
    r = row + 1 + i
    rank = i + 1
    row_fill = rank_fills.get(rank, light_gray_fill if i % 2 == 0 else None)
    
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=1, value=rank)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    
    if i < len(top5_6_detailed):
        item_6, amt_6 = top5_6_detailed[i]
    else:
        item_6, amt_6 = '-', 0
    
    parts = item_6.split(' - ')
    month_name = parts[0] if len(parts) > 0 else ''
    expense_type = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else item_6
    
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=2, value=month_name)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=3, value=expense_type)
    style_data_cell(cell)
    cell.alignment = left_align
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill
    
    cell = ws_table.cell(row=r, column=4, value=amt_6)
    style_data_cell(cell, is_number=True)
    if row_fill: cell.fill = row_fill

# =====================================================
# Sheet 2: Chart Data (hidden, for chart references)
# =====================================================
ws_chart_data = wb.create_sheet('Chart Data')

# === Chart 1 data: Project expenses comparison (File 4 vs File 5) ===
ws_chart_data['A1'] = 'Project'
ws_chart_data['B1'] = 'Dashboard (File 4)'
ws_chart_data['C1'] = 'Profit Statement (File 5)'

all_projects_sorted = sorted(all_projects, key=lambda x: -(expenses_4.get(x, 0) + expenses_5.get(x, 0)))

for i, proj in enumerate(all_projects_sorted):
    r = 2 + i

    ws_chart_data.cell(row=r, column=2, value=expenses_4.get(proj, 0))
    ws_chart_data.cell(row=r, column=3, value=expenses_5.get(proj, 0))

num_projects = len(all_projects_sorted)

# Chart 1

chart1.type = \"col\"
chart1.title = \"Project Expense Comparison: Dashboard vs Profit Statement\"
chart1.y_axis.title = \"Amount\"
chart1.x_axis.title = \"Project\"
chart1.style = 10
chart1.width = 22
chart1.height = 14

data1 = Reference(ws_chart_data, min_col=2, min_row=1, max_col=3, max_row=1+num_projects)

chart1.add_data(data1, titles_from_data=True)

output_path = '/home/user/run/pm_codex_15_plain_rrb1p/model_output/financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx'

#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Generate PH_12 - Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (2024)
Based on the 5 depreciation breakdown CSV source files.
"""

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, PatternFill, Border, Side, numbers

#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Build PH_12 Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger for 2024
"""

import os
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side, numbers
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

# ── Source data from Depreciation_Breakdown_2024 CSVs (verbatim) ──
assets = [
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-001",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 1",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-12-11",
        "Original Value": 33870,
        "Depreciation This Month": 417,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 2277,
        "Net Value": 11669,
        "Residual Value Rate": 5,
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-002",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 2",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-05-02",
        "Original Value": 23387,
        "Depreciation This Month": 291,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 3205,
        "Net Value": 38576,
        "Residual Value Rate": 5,
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-003",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 3",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-02-17",
        "Original Value": 25932,
        "Depreciation This Month": 302,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 3733,
        "Net Value": 14191,
        "Residual Value Rate": 5,
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-004",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 4",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-11-20",
        "Original Value": 19232,
        "Depreciation This Month": 217,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 2535,
        "Net Value": 14297,
        "Residual Value Rate": 5,
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-005",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 5",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-11-18",
        "Original Value": 42301,
        "Depreciation This Month": 591,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 1673,
        "Net Value": 28431,
        "Residual Value Rate": 5,
    },
]

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = "PH_12 Depreciation Ledger"

# ── Styles ──
title_font = Font(name='"'SimSun', size=16, bold=True)
subtitle_font = Font(name='SimSun', size=11)
header_font = Font(name='SimSun', size=10, bold=True, color='FFFFFF')
header_fill = PatternFill(start_color='1E2761', end_color='1E2761', fill_type='solid')
data_font = Font(name='SimSun', size=10)
money_fmt = '#,##0.00'
pct_fmt = '0%'
thin_border = Border(
    left=Side(style='thin'), right=Side(style='thin'),
    top=Side(style='thin'), bottom=Side(style='thin')
)
center_align = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
left_align = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
right_align = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)

# ── Title rows ──
ws.merge_cells('A1:N1')
ws['A1'] = '固定资产折旧明细账 (PH_12)'
ws['A1'].font = title_font
ws['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 36

ws.merge_cells('A2:N2')
ws['A2'] = 'Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger — Year 2024'
ws['A2'].font = subtitle_font
ws['A2'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws.row_dimensions[2].height = 22

# ── Column headers ──
# PH_12 standard columns for a fixed asset depreciation ledger
headers = [
    ('序号\\nNo.', 6),                        # A - Serial number
    ('固定资产编号\\nAsset ID', 16),           # B
    ('固定资产名称\\nAsset Name', 20),         # C
    ('类别\\nCategory', 14),                   # D
    ('规格型号\\nSpec/Model', 12),             # E
    ('购入日期\\nPurchase Date', 14),          # F
    ('原值(¥)\\nOriginal Value', 16),          # G
    ('预计净残值率\\nResidual Rate', 14),       # H
    ('预计净残值(¥)\\nResidual Value', 16),    # I
    ('使用年限(月)\\nUseful Life(Mo)', 14),     # J
    ('月折旧额(¥)\\nMonthly Depr.', 16),       # K
    ('累计折旧(¥)\\nAccum. Depr.', 16),        # L
    ('净值(¥)\\nNet Value', 16),              # M
    ('折旧方法\\nDepr. Method', 14),          # N
]

header_row = 4
for col_idx, (h_text, width) in enumerate(headers, 1):
    cell = ws.cell(row=header_row, column=col_idx, value=h_text)
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.alignment = center_align
    cell.border = thin_border
    ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col_idx)].width = width

ws.row_dimensions[header_row].height = 36

# ── Data rows ──
alt_fill = PatternFill(start_color='F0F4F8', end_color='F0F4F8', fill_type='solid')

for i, a in enumerate(assets):
    row = header_row + 1 + i
    residual_value = a[\"Original Value\"] * a[\"Residual Value Rate\"] / 100
    depreciable_base = a[\"Original Value\"] - residual_value
    useful_life_months = round(depreciable_base / a[\"Depreciation This Month\"])

    values = [
        i + 1,                           # A  序号
        a[\"Asset ID\"],                   # B  资产编号
        a[\"Asset Name\"],                 # C  资产名称
        \"Office Equipment\",              # D  类别
        \"-\",                             # E  规格(无)
        a[\"Purchase Date\"],              # F  购入日期
        a[\"Original Value\"],             # G  原值
        a[\"Residual Value Rate\"] / 100,  # H  残值率
        residual_value,                  # I  预计净残值
        useful_life_months,              # J  使用年限(月)
        a[\"Depreciation This Month\"],    # K  月折旧额
        a[\"Accumulated Depreciation\"],   # L  累计折旧
        a[\"Net Value\"],                  # M  净值
        \"Straight-line\\n(直线法)\",        # N  折旧方法
    ]

    fill = alt_fill if i % 2 == 1 else None

    for col_idx, val in enumerate(values, 1):
        cell = ws.cell(row=row, column=col_idx, value=val)
        cell.font = data_font
        cell.border = thin_border
        if fill:
            cell.fill = fill

        # Number formatting
        if col_idx in (7, 9, 11, 12, 13):  # monetary columns
            cell.number_format = money_fmt
            cell.alignment = right_align
        elif col_idx == 8:  # percentage
            cell.number_format = pct_fmt
            cell.alignment = center_align
        elif col_idx == 6:  # date
            cell.alignment = center_align
        elif col_idx in (1, 10):  # integer
            cell.alignment = center_align
        else:
            cell.alignment = center_align

    ws.row_dimensions[row].height = 22

# ── Totals row ──
total_row = header_row + 1 + len(assets)
total_label_cell = ws.cell(row=total_row, column=1, value='合计')
total_label_cell.font = Font(name='SimSun', size=10, bold=True)
total_label_cell.alignment = center_align
total_label_cell.border = thin_border

ws.merge_cells(start_row=total_row, start_column=1, end_row=total_row, end_column=6)
for c in range(2, 7):
    ws.cell(row=total_row, column=c).border = thin_border

# Calculate totals for monetary columns
total_original = sum(a[\"Original Value\"] for a in assets)
total_residual = sum(a[\"Original Value\"] * a[\"Residual Value Rate\"] / 100 for a in assets)
total_monthly_depr = sum(a[\"Depreciation This Month\"] for a in assets)
total_accum_depr = sum(a[\"Accumulated Depreciation\"] for a in assets)
total_net_value = sum(a[\"Net Value\"] for a in assets)

total_values = {
    7: total_original,
    9: total_residual,
    11: total_monthly_depr,
    12: total_accum_depr,
    13: total_net_value,
}

for col_idx in range(1, 15):
    cell = ws.cell(row=total_row, column=col_idx)
    cell.border = thin_border
    cell.font = Font(name='SimSun', size=10, bold=True)
    if col_idx in total_values:
        cell.value = total_values[col_idx]
        cell.number_format = money_fmt
        cell.alignment = right_align
    elif col_idx not in (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6):
        cell.alignment = center_align

# Residual rate total column = weighted average
weighted_avg_rate = total_residual / total_original
cell_h = ws.cell(row=total_row, column=8, value=weighted_avg_rate)
cell_h.number_format = pct_fmt
cell_h.alignment = center_align
cell_h.font = Font(name='SimSun', size=10, bold=True)
cell_h.border = thin_border

ws.row_dimensions[total_row].height = 22

# ── Footer note ──
footer_row = total_row + 2
ws.merge_cells(start_row=footer_row, start_column=1, end_row=footer_row, end_column=14)
ws.cell(row=footer_row, column=1, value='Note: Depreciation method is straight-line (直线法). Residual value rate is 5% for all assets. Ledger period: Year 2024.').font = Font(name='SimSun', size=9, italic=True, color='666666')

# ── Freeze panes ──
ws.freeze_panes = 'A5'

# ── Print settings ──
ws.sheet_properties.pageSetUpPr = None
ws.print_title_rows = '4:4'

# ── Save ──
output_dir = '/home/user/run/pm_codex_175_hiddenkg_l7_rrb1m/model_output'
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
output_path = os.path.join(output_dir, 'Depreciation_Ledger_For_Fixed_Assets.xlsx')
wb.save(output_path)
print(f\"Saved to: {output_path}\")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Generate Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (PH_12) based on 2024 asset depreciation details.
"""

from openpyxl import Workbook

from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

# ── Data from Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_1.csv through _5.csv ──
# Verified verbatim from semfs grep results

    {

#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Build the Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (PH_12) for 2024
based on the Depreciation_Breakdown_2024 CSV data.
"""

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill, numbers
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
import os

# ── Data from semfs grep results (verbatim transcription) ──
assets = [
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-001",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 1",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-12-11",
        "Original Value": 33870,
        "Depreciation This Month": 417,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 2277,
        "Net Value": 11669,
        "Residual Value Rate": "5%",
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-002",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 2",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-05-02",
        "Original Value": 23387,
        "Depreciation This Month": 291,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 3205,
        "Net Value": 38576,
        "Residual Value Rate": "5%",
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-003",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 3",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-02-17",
        "Original Value": 25932,
        "Depreciation This Month": 302,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 3733,
        "Net Value": 14191,
        "Residual Value Rate": "5%",
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-004",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 4",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-11-20",
        "Original Value": 19232,
        "Depreciation This Month": 217,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 2535,
        "Net Value": 14297,
        "Residual Value Rate": "5%",
    },
    {
        "Asset ID": "FA-2023-005",
        "Asset Name": "Office Equipment 5",
        "Purchase Date": "2023-11-18",
        "Original Value": 42301,
        "Depreciation This Month": 591,
        "Accumulated Depreciation": 1673,
        "Net Value": 28431,
        "Residual Value Rate": "5%",
    },
]

# Compute derived columns for a full ledger
for a in assets:
    a["Depreciation Method"] = "Straight-Line"
    a["Useful Life (Years)"] = 5  # Standard for office equipment under Chinese accounting
    a["Residual Value"] = round(a["Original Value"] * 0.05, 2)

#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Generate Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (PH_12) for 2024
Based on 2024 asset depreciation breakdown data
"""

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import (
    Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side, numbers
)
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from datetime import datetime
import csv
import io
import os

# ─── Data from the 5 CSV files ───────────────────────────────────────────────
csv_data = [
    "Asset ID,Asset Name,Purchase Date,Original Value,Depreciation This Month,Accumulated Depreciation,Net Value,Residual Value Rate",
    "FA-2023-001,Office Equipment 1,2023-12-11,¥33870,¥417,¥2277,¥11669,5%",
    "FA-2023-002,Office Equipment 2,2023-05-02,¥23387,¥291,¥3205,¥38576,5%",
    "FA-2023-003,Office Equipment 3,2023-02-17,¥25932,¥302,¥3733,¥14191,5%",
    "FA-2023-004,Office Equipment 4,2023-11-20,¥19232,¥217,¥2535,¥14297,5%",
    "FA-2023-005,Office Equipment 5,2023-11-18,¥42301,¥591,¥1673,¥28431,5%",
]

def parse_currency(s):
    """Parse ¥12345 format to float"""
    return float(s.replace("¥", "").replace(",", "").strip())

def parse_rate(s):
    """Parse 5% to float 0.05"""
    return float(s.replace("%", "").strip()) / 100.0

# Parse CSV rows
rows = []
for line in csv_data[1:]:  # skip header
    parts = line.split(",")
    asset_id = parts[0].strip()
    asset_name = parts[1].strip()
    purchase_date = parts[2].strip()
    original_value = parse_currency(parts[3])
    depreciation_this_month = parse_currency(parts[4])
    accumulated_depreciation = parse_currency(parts[5])
    net_value = parse_currency(parts[6])
    residual_rate = parse_rate(parts[7])
    rows.append({
        "asset_id": asset_id,
        "asset_name": asset_name,
        "purchase_date": purchase_date,
        "original_value": original_value,
        "depreciation_this_month": depreciation_this_month,
        "accumulated_depreciation": accumulated_depreciation,
        "net_value": net_value,
        "residual_rate": residual_rate,
    })

# ─── Compute derived fields ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# For a PH_12 Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger, standard columns include:
# No., Asset ID, Asset Name, Category, Purchase Date, Original Value,
# Residual Value Rate, Residual Value, Depreciable Amount,
# Useful Life (months), Monthly Depreciation, Accumulated Depreciation,
# Net Book Value, Depreciation Method

# Residual Value = Original Value * Residual Value Rate
# Depreciable Amount = Original Value - Residual Value
# Monthly Depreciation = Depreciation This Month (from data)
# Useful Life (months) = Depreciable Amount / Monthly Depreciation

for r in rows:
    r["residual_value"] = round(r["original_value"] * r["residual_rate"], 2)
    r["depreciable_amount"] = round(r["original_value"] - r["residual_value"], 2)
    if r["depreciation_this_month"] > 0:
        r["useful_life_months"] = round(r["depreciable_amount"] / r["depreciation_this_month"])
    else:
        r["useful_life_months"] = 0

# ─── Create Excel Workbook ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = "Depreciation Ledger"

# Color definitions
navy = "1E2761"
dark_navy = "0D1B3E"

# ─── Column headers (Row 5) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

    (\"Depreciation Method\", 18),
]

header_row = 5
for col_idx, (col_name, col_width) in enumerate(columns, 1):
    cell = ws.cell(row=header_row, column=col_idx, value=col_name)
    cell.font = header_font

    ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col_idx)].width = col_width

ws.row_dimensions[header_row].height = 32

# ─── Data rows ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

data_start_row = 6
for idx, r in enumerate(rows):

    data = [

        r[\"useful_life_months\"],
        r[\"depreciation_this_month\"],

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill, numbers
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from datetime import date, datetime
import math

# ===== Raw asset data from the 5 CSV files =====
assets = [
    # Asset ID, Asset Name, Purchase Date, Original Value (¥), Depreciation This Month (¥), Accumulated Depreciation (¥), Net Value (¥), Residual Value Rate
    (\"FA-2023-001\", \"Office Equipment 1\", \"2023-12-11\", 33870, 417, 2277, 11669, 0.05),
    (\"FA-2023-002\", \"Office Equipment 2\", \"2023-05-02\", 23387, 291, 3205, 38576, 0.05),
    (\"FA-2023-003\", \"Office Equipment 3\", \"2023-02-17\", 25932, 302, 3733, 14191, 0.05),
    (\"FA-2023-004\", \"Office Equipment 4\", \"2023-11-20\", 19232, 217, 2535, 14297, 0.05),
    (\"FA-2023-005\", \"Office Equipment 5\", \"2023-11-18\", 42301, 591, 1673, 28431, 0.05),
]

# Derive useful life and depreciation method
# For straight-line depreciation: Monthly Depr = (Original Value * (1 - Residual Rate)) / (Useful Life in months)
# We can back-calculate useful life from monthly depreciation:
# useful_life_months = Original * (1 - residual_rate) / monthly_depr
# Then round to nearest reasonable year

depreciation_method = \"Straight-Line\"
asset_category = \"Office Equipment\"

wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = \"Depreciation Ledger\"

# ===== Styles =====
header_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=11, color='FFFFFF')
header_fill = PatternFill(start_color='4472C4', end_color='4472C4', fill_type='solid')
title_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=14)
subtitle_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=11)
data_font = Font(name='Arial', size=10)
total_font = Font(name='Arial', bold=True, size=10)
total_fill = PatternFill(start_color='D9E2F3', end_color='D9E2F3', fill_type='solid')
thin_border = Border(
    left=Side(style='thin'),
    right=Side(style='thin'),
    top=Side(style='thin'),
    bottom=Side(style='thin')
)
center_align = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
left_align = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
right_align = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')

# ===== Title =====
ws.merge_cells('A1:Q1')
ws['A1'] = 'Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (PH_12)'
ws['A1'].font = title_font
ws['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

ws.merge_cells('A2:Q2')
ws['A2'] = 'For the Year Ended December 31, 2024'
ws['A2'].font = subtitle_font
ws['A2'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

ws.merge_cells('A3:Q3')
ws['A3'] = f'Prepared Date: {date.today().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")}'
ws['A3'].font = Font(name='Arial', size=10, italic=True)
ws['A3'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

# ===== Column Headers (Row 5) =====
headers = [
    \"No.\",                          # A
    \"Asset ID\",                     # B
    \"Asset Name\",                   # C
    \"Asset Category\",               # D
    \"Purchase Date\",                # E
    \"Original Value (¥)\",          # F
    \"Residual Value Rate\",         # G
    \"Residual Value (¥)\",          # H
    \"Depreciable Amount (¥)\",       # I
    \"Depreciation Method\",         # J
    \"Useful Life (Months)\",        # K
    \"Useful Life (Years)\",         # L
    \"Monthly Depreciation (¥)\",    # M
    \"Accumulated Depreciation (¥)\",# N
    \"Net Book Value (¥)\",         # O
    \"Depreciation Rate (Monthly)\", # P
    \"Status\"                       # Q
]

header_row = 5
for col_idx, header in enumerate(headers, 1):
    cell = ws.cell(row=header_row, column=col_idx, value=header)
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.alignment = center_align
    cell.border = thin_border

# ===== Data Rows =====
total_original = 0
total_accumulated = 0
total_net = 0
total_monthly_depr = 0
total_depreciable = 0

for idx, asset in enumerate(assets, 1):
    asset_id, asset_name, purchase_date_str, original_value, monthly_depr, accum_depr, net_value, residual_rate = asset
    
    # Parse purchase date
    purchase_date = datetime.strptime(purchase_date_str, \"%Y-%m-%d\").date()
    
    # Calculate derived fields
    residual_value = round(original_value * residual_rate, 2)
    depreciable_amount = round(original_value - residual_value, 2)
    
    # Back-calculate useful life from monthly depreciation
    if monthly_depr > 0:
        useful_life_months = round(depreciable_amount / monthly_depr)
    else:
        useful_life_months = 0
    useful_life_years = round(useful_life_months / 12, 1)
    
    # Monthly depreciation rate
    if useful_life_months > 0:
        monthly_depr_rate = round(1 / useful_life_months, 6)
    else:
        monthly_depr_rate = 0
    
    # Status: if net value <= residual value, fully depreciated
    if net_value <= residual_value:
        status = \"Fully Depreciated\"
    else:
        status = \"In Service\"
    
    row = header_row + idx
    data = [
        idx,
        asset_id,
        asset_name,
        asset_category,
        purchase_date,
        original_value,
        residual_rate,
        residual_value,
        depreciable_amount,
        depreciation_method,
        useful_life_months,
        useful_life_years,
        monthly_depr,
        accum_depr,
        net_value,
        monthly_depr_rate,
        status
    ]
    
    for col_idx, value in enumerate(data, 1):
        cell = ws.cell(row=row, column=col_idx, value=value)
        cell.font = data_font
        cell.border = thin_border
        
        if col_idx in (1,):  # No.
            cell.alignment = center_align
        elif col_idx in (2, 3, 4, 10, 17):  # Text fields
            cell.alignment = left_align
        elif col_idx == 5:  # Date
            cell.alignment = center_align
            cell.number_format = 'YYYY-MM-DD'
        elif col_idx == 7:  # Residual rate
            cell.alignment = center_align
            cell.number_format = '0%'
        elif col_idx == 16:  # Monthly depreciation rate
            cell.alignment = center_align
            cell.number_format = '0.0000%'
        elif col_idx in (6, 8, 9, 13, 14, 15):  # Currency
            cell.alignment = right_align
            cell.number_format = '#,##0.00'
        elif col_idx in (11, 12):  # Life
            cell.alignment = center_align
        else:
            cell.alignment = center_align
    
    total_original += original_value
    total_accumulated += accum_depr
    total_net += net_value
    total_monthly_depr += monthly_depr
    total_depreciable += depreciable_amount

# ===== Totals Row =====
total_row = header_row + len(assets) + 1
ws.cell(row=total_row, column=1, value=\"\").border = thin_border
ws.cell(row=total_row, column=2, value=\"TOTAL\").font = total_font
ws.cell(row=total_row, column=2).fill = total_fill
ws.cell(row=total_row, column=2).border = thin_border
ws.cell(row=total_row, column=2).alignment = center_align

for col_idx in range(3, 6):
    cell = ws.cell(row=total_row, column=col_idx, value=\"\")
    cell.fill = total_fill
    cell.border = thin_border

# Sum columns: F(6)=Original Value, I(9)=Depreciable Amount, M(13)=Monthly Depr, N(14)=Accum Depr, O(15)=Net Value
sum_cols = {6: total_original, 9: total_depreciable, 13: total_monthly_depr, 14: total_accumulated, 15: total_net}
for col_idx in range(1, len(headers) + 1):
    cell = ws.cell(row=total_row, column=col_idx)
    cell.fill = total_fill
    cell.border = thin_border
    cell.font = total_font
    if col_idx in sum_cols:
        cell.value = sum_cols[col_idx]
        cell.number_format = '#,##0.00'
        cell.alignment = right_align

# ===== Column Widths =====
col_widths = {
    1: 6,    # No.
    2: 14,   # Asset ID
    3: 22,   # Asset Name
    4: 18,   # Asset Category
    5: 14,   # Purchase Date
    6: 18,   # Original Value
    7: 16,   # Residual Value Rate
    8: 16,   # Residual Value
    9: 20,   # Depreciable Amount
    10: 18,  # Depreciation Method
    11: 18,  # Useful Life (Months)
    12: 16,  # Useful Life (Years)
    13: 22,  # Monthly Depreciation
    14: 24,  # Accumulated Depreciation
    15: 18,  # Net Book Value
    16: 22,  # Depreciation Rate
    17: 16,  # Status
}

for col, width in col_widths.items():
    ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

# ===== Add a second sheet: Monthly Schedule =====
ws2 = wb.create_sheet(\"Monthly Depreciation Schedule\")

ws2.merge_cells('A1:H1')
ws2['A1'] = 'Monthly Depreciation Schedule - 2024'
ws2['A1'].font = title_font
ws2['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

month_headers = [\"Asset ID\", \"Asset Name\"] + [f\"Month {m}\" for m in range(1, 13)] + [\"Annual Total\"]
for col_idx, header in enumerate(month_headers, 1):
    cell = ws2.cell(row=3, column=col_idx, value=header)
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.alignment = center_align
    cell.border = thin_border

for idx, asset in enumerate(assets, 1):
    asset_id, asset_name, purchase_date_str, original_value, monthly_depr, accum_depr, net_value, residual_rate = asset
    row = 3 + idx
    
    ws2.cell(row=row, column=1, value=asset_id).font = data_font
    ws2.cell(row=row, column=1).border = thin_border
    ws2.cell(row=row, column=2, value=asset_name).font = data_font
    ws2.cell(row=row, column=2).border = thin_border
    
    for m in range(1, 13):
        cell = ws2.cell(row=row, column=m + 2, value=monthly_depr)

#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Generate: Depreciation_Ledger_For_Fixed_Assets.xlsx (PH_12)
Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger for 2024 based on the 5 depreciation breakdown CSVs.
"""

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import (
    Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side, numbers
)
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from datetime import datetime
import csv
import os

OUTPUT_PATH = "/home/user/run/pm_codex_175_nokg_rrb1d/model_output/Depreciation_Ledger_For_Fixed_Assets.xlsx"

# ─── Color Palette ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
C_DARK_NAVY   = "1E2761"
C_MED_BLUE    = "2B4B9C"
C_LIGHT_BLUE  = "4472C4"
C_PALE_BLUE   = "D9E2F3"
C_WHITE       = "FFFFFF"
C_BLACK       = "000000"
C_GRAY_LIGHT  = "F2F2F2"
C_GRAY_DARK   = "404040"
C_GREEN       = "375623"
C_GREEN_LIGHT = "C6EFCE"

# ─── Style Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def make_fill(hex_color):
    return PatternFill(fill_type="solid", fgColor=hex_color)

def make_font(name="Arial", size=10, bold=False, color=C_BLACK, italic=False):
    return Font(name=name, size=size, bold=bold, color=color, italic=italic)

def make_border(style="thin"):
    s = Side(style=style, color=C_BLACK)
    return Border(left=s, right=s, top=s, bottom=s)

def make_alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap=True):
    return Alignment(horizontal=horizontal, vertical=vertical, wrap_text=wrap)

def write_cell(ws, row, col, value, fill=None, font=None, align=None, border=None, num_fmt=None):
    c = ws.cell(row=row, column=col, value=value)
    if fill:   c.fill = fill
    if font:   c.font = font
    if align:   c.alignment = align
    if border:  c.border = border
    if num_fmt: c.number_format = num_fmt
    return c

# ─── Read CSV Data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
csv_dir = "/home/user/ws/mnt/Desktop/ASSETS/2024/Depreciation/"
assets = []

for i in range(1, 6):
    csv_path = os.path.join(csv_dir, f"Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_{i}.csv")
    with open(csv_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        for row_data in reader:
            # Parse numeric values (remove ¥ and commas)
            orig_val_str = row_data["Original Value"].replace("¥", "").replace(",", "").strip()
            dep_month_str = row_data["Depreciation This Month"].replace("¥", "").replace(",", "").strip()
            accum_dep_str = row_data["Accumulated Depreciation"].replace("¥", "").replace(",", "").strip()
            net_val_str = row_data["Net Value"].replace("¥", "").replace(",", "").strip()
            residual_str = row_data["Residual Value Rate"].replace("%", "").strip()

            assets.append({
                "asset_id":    row_data["Asset ID"].strip(),
                "asset_name":  row_data["Asset Name"].strip(),
                "purchase_date": row_data["Purchase Date"].strip(),
                "original_value": float(orig_val_str),
                "depreciation_this_month": float(dep_month_str),
                "accumulated_depreciation": float(accum_dep_str),
                "net_value": float(net_val_str),
                "residual_value_rate": float(residual_str) / 100.0,
            })

# Sort by asset ID
assets.sort(key=lambda x: x["asset_id"])

# ─── Compute Derived Fields ───────────────────────────────────────────
for a in assets:
    # Depreciable amount = Original Value - Residual Value
    a["residual_value"] = a["original_value"] * a["residual_value_rate"]
    a["depreciable_amount"] = a["original_value"] - a["residual_value"]
    # Annual depreciation estimate from monthly: monthly * 12
    a["annual_depreciation"] = a["depreciation_this_month"] * 12
    # Estimated useful life (years) = depreciable amount / annual depreciation
    if a["annual_depreciation"] > 0:
        a["useful_life_years"] = round(a["depreciable_amount"] / a["annual_depreciation"], 1)
    else:
        a["useful_life_years"] = 0
    # Months already depreciated
    if a["depreciation_this_month"] > 0:
        a["months_depreciated"] = round(a["accumulated_depreciation"] / a["depreciation_this_month"])
    else:
        a["months_depreciated"] = 0
    # Depreciation rate (monthly)
    if a["depreciable_amount"] > 0:
        a["monthly_dep_rate"] = a["depreciation_this_month"] / a["depreciable_amount"]
    else:
        a["monthly_dep_rate"] = 0
    # Depreciation method
    a["dep_method"] = "Straight-Line"
    # Category based on asset name
    a["category"] = "Office Equipment"

# ─── Create Workbook ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()

    "C": 22,  # Asset Name
    "D": 18,  # Category

    "F": 20,  # Depreciation Method
    "G": 16,  # Useful Life (Years)
    "H": 18,  # Original Value
    "I": 16,  # Residual Value Rate

}
for col_letter, width in col_widths.items():
    ws.column_dimensions[col_letter].width = width

# ─── Title Row ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ws.merge_cells("A1:P1")
title_cell = ws["A1"]

title_cell.fill = make_fill(C_DARK_NAVY)
title_cell.font = make_font(size=16, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

# ─── Subtitle Row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ws.merge_cells("A2:P2")
sub = ws["A2"]
sub.value = "Report Date: 2024-12-31 | Depreciation Method: Straight-Line | Residual Value Rate: 5%"
sub.fill = make_fill(C_MED_BLUE)
sub.font = make_font(size=9, italic=True, color=C_WHITE)
sub.alignment = make_alignment()
ws.row_dimensions[2].height = 25

# ─── Headers Row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
headers = [
    "No.", "Asset ID", "Asset Name", "Category", "Purchase Date",
    "Depreciation Method", "Useful Life (Years)", "Original Value (¥)",
    "Residual Value Rate", "Residual Value (¥)", "Depreciable Amount (¥)",

]

header_row = 3

hdr_fill = make_fill(C_LIGHT_BLUE)

for i, h in enumerate(headers):

# ─── Data Rows ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
data_start_row = 4

for idx, a in enumerate(assets):

    # Parse values - remove ¥ and commas

    accum_dep_str = row_dict['Accumulated Depreciation'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '').strip()
    net_val_str = row_dict['Net Value'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '').strip()
    residual_str = row_dict['Residual Value Rate'].replace('%', '').strip()

    values = [
        row_dict['Asset ID'],
        row_dict['Asset Name'],
        row_dict['Purchase Date'],
        float(orig_val_str),
        float(dep_month_str),
        float(accum_dep_str),
        float(net_val_str),
        float(residual_str) / 100.0
    ]

    for col_idx, (value, header) in enumerate(zip(values, headers), 1):
        cell = ws.cell(row=row_idx, column=col_idx, value=value)
        cell.font = data_font
        cell.border = thin_border

        # Alternating row fill
        if (row_idx - 4) % 2 == 1:
            cell.fill = alt_fill

        # Alignment and number formatting
        if col_idx == 1 or col_idx == 2:
            cell.alignment = left_align if col_idx == 2 else center_align

            cell.alignment = center_align

import csv
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill, numbers
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
import os

# Read all 5 CSV files
data = []
csv_dir = \"/home/user/ws/plain/Desktop/ASSETS/2024/Depreciation\"
for i in range(1, 6):
    filepath = os.path.join(csv_dir, f\"Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_{i}.csv\")
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        for row in reader:
            data.append(row)

# Create workbook
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = \"Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger\"

# Define styles
title_font = Font(name='Arial', size=16, bold=True)
header_font = Font(name='Arial', size=11, bold=True, color='FFFFFF')
data_font = Font(name='Arial', size=10)
header_fill = PatternFill(start_color='4472C4', end_color='4472C4', fill_type='solid')
header_alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
center_alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
right_alignment = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')
thin_border = Border(
    left=Side(style='thin'),
    right=Side(style='thin'),
    top=Side(style='thin'),
    bottom=Side(style='thin')
)
alt_fill = PatternFill(start_color='D9E2F3', end_color='D9E2F3', fill_type='solid')

# Title row
ws.merge_cells('A1:H1')
ws['A1'] = \"Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (2024)\"
ws['A1'].font = title_font
ws['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 35

# Headers
headers = ['Asset ID', 'Asset Name', 'Purchase Date', 'Original Value (¥)', 
           'Depreciation This Month (¥)', 'Accumulated Depreciation (¥)', 
           'Net Value (¥)', 'Residual Value Rate']

for col_idx, header in enumerate(headers, 1):
    cell = ws.cell(row=3, column=col_idx, value=header)
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.alignment = header_alignment
    cell.border = thin_border

# Column widths
col_widths = [15, 22, 15, 20, 25, 28, 18, 20]
for idx, width in enumerate(col_widths, 1):
    ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(idx)].width = width

# Data rows
for row_idx, row in enumerate(data, 4):
    # Parse values - remove ¥ and commas
    original_value_str = row['Original Value'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')
    dep_month_str = row['Depreciation This Month'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')
    accum_dep_str = row['Accumulated Depreciation'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')
    net_value_str = row['Net Value'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')
    
    values = [
        row['Asset ID'],
        row['Asset Name'],
        row['Purchase Date'],
        float(original_value_str),
        float(dep_month_str),
        float(accum_dep_str),
        float(net_value_str),
        row['Residual Value Rate']
    ]
    
    for col_idx, val in enumerate(values, 1):
        cell = ws.cell(row=row_idx, column=col_idx, value=val)
        cell.font = data_font
        cell.border = thin_border
        
        if col_idx in [4, 5, 6, 7]:  # Currency columns
            cell.number_format = '#,##0'
            cell.alignment = right_alignment
        elif col_idx == 8:  # Residual value rate
            cell.alignment = center_alignment
        elif col_idx == 3:  # Date
            cell.alignment = center_alignment
        else:
            cell.alignment = center_alignment
        
        # Alternating row colors
        if (row_idx - 4) % 2 == 1:
            cell.fill = alt_fill

# Totals row
totals_row = 4 + len(data)
ws.merge_cells(f'A{totals_row}:C{totals_row}')
cell = ws.cell(row=totals_row, column=1, value='Total')
cell.font = Font(name='Arial', size=10, bold=True)
cell.alignment = center_alignment
cell.border = thin_border

for col in range(2, 4):
    ws.cell(row=totals_row, column=col).border = thin_border

# Calculate totals
total_original = sum(float(row['Original Value'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')) for row in data)
total_dep_month = sum(float(row['Depreciation This Month'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')) for row in data)
total_accum = sum(float(row['Accumulated Depreciation'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')) for row in data)
total_net = sum(float(row['Net Value'].replace('¥', '').replace(',', '')) for row in data)

totals_values = [None, None, None, total_original, total_dep_month, total_accum, total_net, None]
for col_idx, val in enumerate(totals_values, 1):
    if val is not None:
        cell = ws.cell(row=totals_row, column=col_idx, value=val)
        cell.font = Font(name='Arial', size=10, bold=True)
        cell.number_format = '#,##0'
        cell.alignment = right_alignment
        cell.border = thin_border
    elif col_idx == 8:

        cell.border = thin_border

# Output path
output_path = \"/home/user/run/pm_codex_175_plain_rrb1p/model_output/Depreciation_Ledger_For_Fixed_Assets.xlsx\"
wb.save(output_path)
print(f\"Saved to {output_path}\")

import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, re

def parse_xlsx(path):
    z = zipfile.ZipFile(path)
    data = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml').decode('utf-8')
    ns = {'s': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
    root = ET.fromstring(data)
    rows = []
    for row_el in root.iter('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main}row'):
        cells = []
        for cell in row_el.iter('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main}c'):
            # Get inline string
            t_el = cell.find('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main}v')
            is_el = cell.find('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main}is')
            val = ''
            if is_el is not None:
                t = is_el.find('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main}t')
                if t is not None and t.text:
                    val = t.text
            elif t_el is not None and t_el.text:
                val = t_el.text
            cells.append(val)
        rows.append(cells)
    return rows

import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

def parse_xlsx(path):
    z = zipfile.ZipFile(path)
    # Get shared strings
    ss = []
    try:
        with z.open('xl/sharedStrings.xml') as f:
            tree = ET.parse(f)
            ns = {'ns': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
            for si in tree.findall('.//ns:si', ns):
                texts = [t.text for t in si.findall('.//ns:t', ns) if t.text]
                ss.append(''.join(texts))
    except:
        pass
    
    rows = []
    with z.open('xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml') as f:
        tree = ET.parse(f)
        ns = {'ns': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
        for row_elem in tree.findall('.//ns:row', ns):
            row = []
            for cell in row_elem.findall('ns:c', ns):
                v = cell.find('ns:v', ns)
                t_attr = cell.get('t', '')
                if v is not None and v.text:
                    if t_attr == 's':
                        row.append(ss[int(v.text)])
                    else:
                        row.append(v.text)
                else:
                    row.append('')
            rows.append(row)
    return rows

rows = parse_xlsx('/home/user/ws/mnt/desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-list.xlsx')

    print(content.decode('utf-8')[:5000])
